mapper.sql: SELECT b.JOIN_NO , b.USER_ID , b.CATEGORY , b.PARTICIPANTS , b.REGION , b.START_DATE , b.END_DATE , b.TITLE , b.CONTENT , b.CREATE_DATE , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM JOIN_REQUEST sub_r WHERE sub_r.JOIN_NO = b.JOIN_NO AND sub_r.STATUS = 'ACCEPTED') AS CURRENT_COUNT

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r.JOIN_NO, r.JOIN_REQUEST_NO AS REQ_NO, r.USER_ID AS REQ_USER_ID, f.FILE_PATH || f.CHANGE_NAME AS PROFILE FROM JOIN_REQUEST r LEFT JOIN USER_FILE f ON r.USER_ID = f.USER_ID WHERE r.STATUS = 'ACCEPTED' ) r ON b.JOIN_NO = r.JOIN_NO
mapper.select: , u.USER_NAME FROM JOIN_BOARD b JOIN PLOGUES_USER u ON b.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE b.DELETED = 'N' AND b.JOIN_NO = #{joinNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE JOIN_BOARD SET DELETED = 'Y' WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND JOIN_NO = #{joinNo}
